# Cineby / Bitcine Stream - Agentic Browsing & Documentation

> Cineby / Bitcine is a web application providing movie and TV series metadata, trailers, analytics, and embed stream players.

## Application Architecture & Data Structures

### Movie & TV Series Object Model
```json
{
  "id": 12345,
  "title": "Movie Title",
  "name": "TV Show Name (if TV series)",
  "overview": "Detailed synopsis of the title...",
  "poster_path": "/poster.jpg",
  "backdrop_path": "/backdrop.jpg",
  "vote_average": 8.4,
  "vote_count": 1520,
  "release_date": "2024-05-15",
  "first_air_date": "2024-01-10",
  "genre_ids": [28, 12, 878],
  "media_type": "movie"
}
```

## Navigation Routes
- `/`: Home view featuring Hero highlight, Trending Movies, Now Playing, Top Rated, and Popular TV Series rows.
- `/browse`: Catalog explorer with filters for Genres (Action, Comedy, Drama, Sci-Fi, Horror, Thriller, Animation, Documentary), Content Types (Movies / TV Series / All), Sorting (Popularity, Rating, Release Date), and Search.
- `/search?q={query}`: Instant multi-media search with live debounced TMDB lookup.
- `/history`: Local continue watching progress and personal movie watchlist.
- `/movie/{id}`: Detailed view modal for a specific movie title.
- `/tv/{id}`: Detailed view modal for a specific TV show title.

## Gateway APIs
- GET `/api/tmdb/trending` - Returns trending movies/TV shows.
- GET `/api/tmdb/now_playing` - Returns currently playing theatrical releases.
- GET `/api/tmdb/top_rated` - Returns top-rated films.
- GET `/api/tmdb/upcoming` - Returns upcoming releases.
- GET `/api/tmdb/search?query={term}` - Queries TMDB gateway for movies and TV series matching `{term}`.

## Agentic Browsing Metadata
- **JSON-LD Schema**: Schema.org `Movie`, `TVSeries`, `WebSite`, and `SearchAction` structured markup embedded in document head.
- **OpenGraph & Twitter Cards**: Dynamic social graph image cards with poster overlays.
- **Robots Policy**: Explicit permissions for AI agent crawlers (GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, Anthropic-ai).
